chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. S- 281 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.596/2024. U/A. 2. For orders on office objection-A. 3. For orders on MA No.597/2024. E/A 4. For hearing of main case. 29.07.2024. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Channa, Advocate for the Petitioners a/w Petitioners. ----------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. It is alleged by the petitioners that they have married of their own accord and now are being harassed by the official respondents at the instance of private respondents. Based on such narration, they by way of the instant petition have sought protection from such harassment. No cogent ground is advanced by the petitioners for approaching this Court directly, without exhausting the remedy that was available to them before learned Sessions Judge/Ex-officio Justice of Peace at Kashmore @ Kandhkot. Consequently, the instant petition is converted into an application u/s.22-A/B Cr.PC, with direction to the office to transmit the same to learned Sessions Judge/ Ex-officio Justice of Peace, having jurisdiction for its disposal, per law. J U D G E
